prerequisite_rows.detail: the commercial-aerospace intraday lane should stay frozen until a lawful point-in-time state feed, an execution simulator, and a separate intraday replay lane exist

workstream_rows.current_gap: governance_only_minute_labels_and_day-level event framing exist, but no point-in-time intraday visibility chain exists
workstream_rows.scope: build a minute-indexed state feed for the first-hour and replay-relevant windows using only same-minute and prior-minute price, volume, and event visibility
workstream_rows.inputs: raw 1min archives, frozen minute supervision registry, day-level event registry converted into minute-visible state updates
workstream_rows.deliverables: point-in-time minute feature table, minute-visible event-state table with first_visible_ts and close-bar activation semantics, explicit timestamp lineage audit
workstream_rows.acceptance_gate: every state column is reconstructible at minute t without using minute t+1 or later, all event/state fields carry first_visible_ts, same-minute aggregates only activate after the bar closes, and seed sessions can be replayed minute by minute
workstream_rows.non_goals: do not change the frozen EOD primary or inject minute rules into current replay

workstream_rows.current_gap: no intraday fill model or minute-level action simulator is attached to the governance package
workstream_rows.scope: build a separate intraday shadow execution simulator that consumes the point-in-time feed and governance ladder actions
workstream_rows.inputs: point-in-time minute feed, action ladder, fee/slippage assumptions, symbol-level minute bars
workstream_rows.deliverables: deterministic fill simulator, explicit trigger-to-fill policy, cost model, no-readd and panic-derisk semantics
workstream_rows.acceptance_gate: trigger, fill, and cost timing are explicit; same-bar future knowledge is impossible; seed sessions can be simulated reproducibly
workstream_rows.non_goals: do not optimize PnL or tune local alpha before the simulator exists

workstream_rows.current_gap: the lawful EOD replay remains authoritative and isolated from the minute governance branch
workstream_rows.scope: bind the simulator into a dedicated intraday replay lane that is isolated from the frozen commercial-aerospace EOD primary
workstream_rows.inputs: point-in-time minute feed, intraday execution simulator, frozen EOD primary orders and state as reference only
workstream_rows.deliverables: intraday shadow replay outputs, comparison reports versus frozen EOD baseline, contamination guardrails
workstream_rows.acceptance_gate: intraday experiments run without mutating the EOD baseline, the shadow lane is physically read-only relative to the frozen EOD primary, all outputs are clearly shadow-only, and replay binding is minute-lawful
workstream_rows.non_goals: do not promote intraday execution into the authoritative lane during initial buildout

sequencing_rows.exit_condition: minute state feed passes timestamp-lineage audit on canonical seed sessions
seed sessions simulate deterministically with explicit fill timing and costs
intraday replay lane exists as a separate shadow surface without contaminating the frozen EOD primary

interpretation: V1.33M converts the frozen intraday blockers into a concrete three-workstream build protocol.
The protocol is intentionally infrastructural: it defines how to build a lawful intraday lane without reopening board-local alpha drift.
